acceptanceCriteria.text: Dashboard loads key stats for the authenticated user
Weakest skill and next recommended action are visible above the fold
Streak, XP, and credit balance are accurate and real-time

snapshot.description: Shows skill activity, latest reports, streak, XP, badges, quests, and credit balance. Learning trend and weak-area analysis. Weakest skill and next recommended action above the fold.
snapshot.title: Module 8: Dashboard and progress
